text: 15. RELEASE AND WAIVER: SUBCONTRACTOR HEREBY RELEASES, AND SHALL CAUSE ITS SUBSUBCONTRACTORS TO RELEASE, CONTRACTOR PARTIES FROM ANY AND ALL CLAIMS OR CAUSES OF ACTION WHATSOEVER WHICH SUBCONTRACTOR AND/OR ITS SUBSUBCONTRACTORS MIGHT OTHERWISE NOW OR HEREAFTER POSSESS RESULTING IN OR FROM OR IN ANY WAY CONNECTED WITH ANY LOSS COVERED BY INSURANCE, WHETHER
